title: Provision production infrastructure values for deployment smoke
description: Track external/manual production readiness values and infrastructure actions that cannot be completed from the repository: DNS A/AAAA for DOMAIN, VPS Docker/Compose host, firewall ports 80/443, production .env secrets, BotFather token, manager Telegram IDs, optional DaData key, off-host backup target, and alert ownership.
acceptance_criteria: DNS points to the production VPS; Docker Compose host is provisioned; .env is created on the VPS with production values and chmod 600; Caddy can issue HTTPS certificate; PostgreSQL/upload backup destination is confirmed; owner for monitoring/alerts is named; Direct Buy-1z7.5 can run smoke/E2E against the deployed stack.
notes:
Reviewed blocked return b858da05. Accepted blocker state: current production app host 91.132.59.194 lacks Docker/Compose, .env is mode 644 and missing Phase 20 keys, backup destination and alert owner are unnamed, and topology must be confirmed before Direct Buy-1z7.5.
Resolving accepted blocker: current production smoke contract stays PM2/Nginx behind central Caddy; Compose migration is not part of the Direct Buy-1z7.6 smoke readiness gate.
close_reason: Production infrastructure readiness resolved for current PM2/Nginx smoke contract: .env mode/key presence fixed, target and credential path named, central Caddy/app host verified, backup destination/schedule and alert/BotFather owner named.

acceptance_criteria: Deployment docs/checklist identify required env vars and secrets without exposing values; docker-compose/Caddy/ecosystem assumptions are checked; smoke commands are listed; remaining external/manual steps are explicit Beads defers, not silent TODOs.
notes: Returned artifact .codex/stages/stage-2026-05-02-phase20-deployment/artifacts/Direct Buy-1z7.3.md. Deployment runbook/config updates prepared; external production values tracked in Direct Buy-1z7.6; local npm build/test remain blocked by Direct Buy-1z7.1 runtime/toolchain.
close_reason: Integrated deployment runbook/config on master; docker compose config, Caddy validate, Docker image build, lint, tests, and build passed. External production values remain tracked in Direct Buy-1z7.6.

acceptance_criteria: Node/package-manager contract is explicit in repo; supported runtime is documented; npm/pnpm ambiguity is resolved or intentionally documented; npm/pnpm run lint/test/build behavior is verified under the chosen runtime or blocker is explicitly recorded.
close_reason: Returned toolchain baseline artifact. Node 22/pnpm contract declared; lint/test pass under Node 22.18.0; build blocker documented as missing DATABASE_URL during admin prerender.

title: Пропуск вопросов Да/Нет в create-lot: нет retry-цикла
description:
GitHub Issue #1 от тестера @liliya12m.

**Симптом:** При вводе «нет» (или любого слова не содержащего «да») на Да/Нет вопросе бот принимает это как false и идёт дальше без переспроса. Тестер ожидала переспрос.

**Корневая причина:** В bot/conversations/create-lot.ts строки 72-84, три вопроса (долги ЖКУ, ипотека, прописанные) не имеют retry-цикла — любой ответ трактуется как false.

**Ссылка на issue:** https://github.com/maslennikov-ig/direct-buy-express/issues/1

**Скриншот тестера:** https://skr.sh/saTzhGeoPni

**Фикс:** Добавить retry-цикл с явной валидацией 'да'/'нет' для трёх вопросов. Обновить тесты.
close_reason: Fixed: added retry loop for Да/Нет questions in create-lot.ts. Commit 9cfb4df. All 93 tests passing.

title: Security: Zod settings schema allows unknown keys (missing .strict())
description: In app/api/admin/settings/route.ts, z.object({...}).partial() silently strips unknown keys instead of rejecting them. Add .strict() to fail fast on unknown keys.
close_reason: Added .strict() to Zod settingsSchema in route.ts

- Блокировать переход к следующему шагу без 7 фото.
- Максимум 10 фото.
- Сохранять file_id в Media records.

title: Phase 13: Owner Choice Flow
description: Собственник видит топ-ставки. Согласен → winnerId + WAITING_DOCS + SLA_DOCS_UPLOAD. Не согласен → Alert менеджеру. Калькулятор: ставка - 100000 - комиссия.
close_reason: Owner Choice Flow implemented: bot/handlers/owner-choice.ts with calculator (bid-100K), sendOwnerChoiceOffer, handleOwnerChoice (agree→WAITING_DOCS+SLA, reject→manager alert). Integrated with bot/index.ts and worker CLOSE_AUCTION. 7 tests. 94/94.

close_reason: Removed all hardcoded fallbacks: middleware.ts, lib/admin-auth.ts, app/api/admin/auth/route.ts. ADMIN_SESSION_TOKEN and ADMIN_PASSWORD now required. 84/84 tests pass.

title: Fix test:e2e runner isolation for Phase 20 gates
description: Phase 20 smoke ran npm run test:e2e on 2026-05-02. The script invokes `dotenv -e .env.test vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts`, but the workspace resolves a non-Node dotenv CLI and exits before Vitest with: Invalid value for '-e' / '--export': '.env.test' is not a valid boolean. The E2E spec also performs destructive deleteMany calls and must only run against an explicitly isolated test database, never production.
acceptance_criteria: npm run test:e2e resolves a repo-pinned Node dotenv CLI or equivalent; missing .env.test/test DATABASE_URL fails with a clear safe message before destructive setup; documented command runs successfully against an isolated test database.
notes: Orchestrator acceptance review tightened E2E DB-name safety marker matching: test/e2e/ci must be token-delimited, not merely a substring. Added regression coverage for substring-only names such as contest.
close_reason: Fixed E2E runner isolation: removed global dotenv CLI dependency, added .env.test/.env.test.local loader and destructive DB safety guards, verified npm run test:e2e against isolated local test DB plus lint/test/build/process gates.

title: Run Phase 20 smoke and E2E deployment gate
description: After toolchain, deployment checklist, and unit gate are ready, run the risk-triggered E2E/smoke deployment verification for admin, bot, worker, DB, Redis, media, and queue flows.
acceptance_criteria: Smoke/E2E commands are run or blockers are recorded; deployment-critical failures are fixed or filed as bounded tasks; Phase 20 closeout has clear pass/fail evidence.
notes:
Do not launch while Direct Buy-1z7.6 is blocked. Smoke target is reachable at https://directbuy.aidevteam.ru, but production host/env/backups/alert ownership are not ready for safe smoke handoff.
Direct Buy-1z7.6 closed. Smoke target: https://directbuy.aidevteam.ru. Credential source: /var/www/directbuy/current/.env on root@91.132.59.194. First known smoke finding: authorized /api/lots reaches app auth and returns 500; investigate under this gate.
Returned production smoke: fixed authorized /api/lots 500 by serializing Prisma BigInt fields; deployed code commit 76db9ea and post-fix authorized /api/lots returns HTTP 200. Phase 20 close remains blocked by npm run test:e2e runner isolation; filed Direct Buy-1z7.7.
close_reason: Production smoke gate returned: fixed and deployed authorized /api/lots 500; post-fix production smoke passed; E2E runner isolation blocker filed as Direct Buy-1z7.7, so Phase 20 remains open.

acceptance_criteria: Unit tests run under the chosen supported runtime; failures are fixed or split into new bounded Beads tasks with evidence; no unrelated production behavior is changed.
close_reason: Unit gate completed on integrated Node 22.18.0/pnpm 10.7.0 tree: pnpm test passed 25 files / 95 tests.
